headline: Heritage Building Demolitions Hit 120 Per Year Record
context: National Heritage Department recorded 120 pre-1957 heritage building demolitions in 2025 the highest annual rate since records began.

cards.sub: Highest destruction rate as developers prioritize land value over preservation

cards.big: Only 185 buildings formally gazetted under National Heritage Act 2005
cards.sub: Estimated 12,000 heritage-significant buildings lack legal protection status

cards.big: George Town UNESCO zone lost 8 shophouses to unapproved renovation in 2025
cards.sub: UNESCO issued formal warning that losses could endanger World Heritage status

cards.big: Heritage tax incentives attracted only 45 applications in 2 years
cards.sub: Maximum RM500,000 deduction covers less than 20% of typical restoration costs

cards.big: Heritage demolition tests whether cultural value can compete with development economics
120 heritage buildings demolished per year. Preservation requires legal protection, not heritage awareness campaigns.
